command_log.command: echo '## Existing Backlog Issues' && ls .kiln/issues/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(none)' && echo '---' && echo '## Completed Issues' && ls .kiln/issues/completed/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(none)'

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true) && if [[ -n "$STATE_FILE" ]]; then echo "State file: $STATE_FILE"; python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$STATE_FILE')); print('cursor:', d.get('cursor')); print('workflow:', d.get('workflow_name')); print('step_statuses:', json.dumps(d.get('step_statuses',{}), indent=2))" 2>/dev/null || cat "$STATE_FILE" | head -5; else echo "No state file found"; fi

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$STATE_FILE')); print('cursor:', d.get('cursor')); print('workflow:', d.get('workflow_name'))"

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('$STATE_FILE'))
print('cursor:', d.get('cursor'))
print('workflow:', d.get('workflow_name'))
print('embedded_cursor:', d.get('embedded_cursor'))
print('embedded_workflow:', d.get('embedded_workflow'))
ss = d.get('step_statuses', {})
if ss:
    print('step_statuses:', json.dumps(ss, indent=2))
"

python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('.wheel/state_0f81d2ae-64ed-48c0-a2ed-8bf1c242d765_1775686178_28786.json'))
for k,v in sorted(d.items()):
    if k == 'context': continue  # skip large context
    print(f'{k}: {v}')
"

echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)" && echo "Last 5 commits:" && git log --format='%h %s' -5 && echo '---' && echo "Open issues: $(gh issue list --state open --json number --limit 100 2>/dev/null | jq length)" && echo "Backlog: $(ls .kiln/issues/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') items" && echo "PRDs: $(ls docs/features/*/PRD.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo '---' && echo 'Task progress:' && for f in specs/*/tasks.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; DONE=$(grep -c '\[X\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); TOTAL=$(grep -c '\[[ X]\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "  $(dirname $f | xargs basename): $DONE/$TOTAL"; done && echo "VERSION: $(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null || echo none)"

if [ -f .shelf-config ]; then cat .shelf-config; else echo 'No .shelf-config — using defaults'; echo "slug=$(basename $(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.git$//') 2>/dev/null || basename $(pwd))"; echo 'base_path=projects'; fi
gh issue list --state all --json number,title,state,updatedAt --limit 100 2>/dev/null || echo '[]'

echo '## Backlog Issues' && for f in .kiln/issues/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo '(none)'; break; }; TITLE=$(grep -m1 '^title:' "$f" | sed 's/^title:[[:space:]]*"\{0,1\}//;s/"$//' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); STATUS=$(grep -m1 '^status:' "$f" | sed 's/^status:[[:space:]]*//' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); echo "$(basename $f): $TITLE [$STATUS]"; done && echo '## Completed' && ls .kiln/issues/completed/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo ' completed issues'

for prd in docs/features/*/PRD.md; do [ -f "$prd" ] || { echo '(no PRDs)'; break; }; DIR=$(basename $(dirname "$prd")); SLUG=$(echo "$DIR" | sed 's/^[0-9]\{4\}-[0-9]\{2\}-[0-9]\{2\}-//'); TITLE=$(grep -m1 '^# ' "$prd" | sed 's/^# //'); FR_COUNT=$(grep -c 'FR-' "$prd" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NFR_COUNT=$(grep -c 'NFR-' "$prd" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); STATUS=$(grep -m1 '^\*\*Status\*\*' "$prd" | sed 's/.*: *//'); echo "SLUG=$SLUG TITLE=$TITLE FRs=$FR_COUNT NFRs=$NFR_COUNT STATUS=$STATUS PATH=$prd"; done

echo '## Tech Stack Detection' && ls package.json tsconfig.json Cargo.toml pyproject.toml requirements.txt go.mod Gemfile Dockerfile docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yaml compose.yml compose.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '(no markers)' && if [ -f package.json ]; then echo '---' && echo 'package.json deps:' && cat package.json | jq -r '(.dependencies // {}) + (.devDependencies // {}) | keys[]' 2>/dev/null; fi && if [ -d .github/workflows ]; then echo '---' && echo 'infra/github-actions'; fi
